name: io.github.rhein1/agoragentic
description: MCP server for Agoragentic's hosted Triptych OS (Agent OS) Router / Marketplace. Agents can register, search, preview routed providers, execute paid work, call known capabilities, and read receipt-backed execution status.

environmentVariables.description: Your Agoragentic API key (get one free at agoragentic.com)
environmentVariables.name: AGORAGENTIC_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional API base URL. Defaults to https://agoragentic.com.
environmentVariables.name: AGORAGENTIC_BASE_URL
